title: Fast Fiction Factory Source-Span Quality Audit

review_memory_checked.prior_signal_summary: The source-span routing review pack was generated and automated guards passed, but human quality acceptance of span usefulness and routing judgment was not recorded.
review_memory_checked.what_changed: This slice classifies the existing 36 source-span rows into usefulness, weak-span, overly-broad-span, missing-ref, ambiguous-routing, guarded-unsafe-route, and human-owned-boundary categories.
review_memory_checked.what_this_review_decides: No user review is required now; this audit decides which non-redundant span/routing issues are concrete enough for a future bounded fixture or routing fix.
not_asking: repeat review of access procedure or four-mode IA
canon decisions for Toma fate, brass moth truth, or Council motive
review_memory_checked.next_nonredundant_axis: one bounded weak-span, broad-span, or ambiguous-routing fix, or one missing fixture class

classification_rules.useful_span: source span matches the raw memo, has source refs, and is neither marked weak nor overly broad in this qualitative pass
classification_rules.weak_span: span is valid but too thin for the routing/decision it supports without surrounding context
classification_rules.overly_broad_span: span is valid but carries a larger clause or multiple unresolved alternatives that should be narrowed or split later
classification_rules.missing_source_ref: source ref is absent or unresolved; current audit found none
classification_rules.ambiguous_routing: routing is guarded but may ask one row to serve too many review surfaces
classification_rules.unsafe_routing_guarded: visual/source-sensitive routing remains review-held and covered by existing guards; current audit found no unsafe failure
classification_rules.human_owned_boundary_preserved: row touches protected human-owned decisions and remains held instead of adopt/provisional

review_debt.current_state: 6 valid spans need more surrounding context or a narrower follow-up fixture before they can prove routing usefulness by themselves.
review_debt.next_move: Pick one weak row and either widen the span slightly or add a fixture that supplies surrounding context.

review_debt.current_state: 2 valid spans carry too much clause-level information for a compact review surface.
review_debt.next_move: Split broad visual/placeholder spans into narrower evidence and unresolved-decision rows.

review_debt.current_state: 7 rows are guarded but route across multiple decision surfaces.
review_debt.next_move: Decide primary route or split target destinations only after a bounded fixture change, not a general review request.

review_debt.current_state: The prior pack still lacks contradictory claims, broad spans, malformed spans, multilingual text, sparse bullets, and provider envelope cases.
review_debt.next_move: Add one fixture class at a time after choosing which audit category creates the most review friction.
